# Ten-Letter Word Frequencies

Reference frequencies computed over **248,010** English words of length 3–10 (the baseline corpus). Rankings cover **45,872** ten-letter words. All tables sortable by clicking column headers.

## Ten-letter words

### Top 50 by letter coverage

Score = sum of baseline rates over the **distinct** letters in the word. Words that pack many high-frequency letters score highest; repeats add nothing.

<table class="freq-table sortable-table ranking-table" id="rank-letter">
  <thead><tr><th class="sortable" data-col="0">Rank</th><th class="sortable" data-col="1">Word</th><th class="sortable" data-col="2">Distinct letters</th><th class="sortable" data-col="3">Score (letter)</th></tr></thead>
  <tbody>
  <tr class="bucket-row clickable" data-bucket-id="1"><td class="freq-rank" data-value="1">1</td><td class="freq-word">interposal <span class="tied-count">+1 more</span></td><td class="freq-letters">e a i s r o n t l p</td><td class="freq-score" data-value="0.706844">0.7068</td></tr>
  <tr><td class="freq-rank" data-value="2">2</td><td class="freq-word">hortensial</td><td class="freq-letters">e a i s r o n t l h</td><td class="freq-score" data-value="0.703088">0.7031</td></tr>
  <tr class="bucket-row clickable" data-bucket-id="3"><td class="freq-rank" data-value="3">3</td><td class="freq-word">cautioners <span class="tied-count">+3 more</span></td><td class="freq-letters">e a i s r o n t c u</td><td class="freq-score" data-value="0.699560">0.6996</td></tr>
  <tr class="bucket-row clickable" data-bucket-id="4"><td class="freq-rank" data-value="4">4</td><td class="freq-word">draconites <span class="tied-count">+1 more</span></td><td class="freq-letters">e a i s r o n t c d</td><td class="freq-score" data-value="0.698202">0.6982</td></tr>
  <tr><td class="freq-rank" data-value="5">5</td><td class="freq-word">resudation</td><td class="freq-letters">e a i s r o n t u d</td><td class="freq-score" data-value="0.696748">0.6967</td></tr>
  <tr><td class="freq-rank" data-value="6">6</td><td class="freq-word">isonuclear</td><td class="freq-letters">e a i s r o n l c u</td><td class="freq-score" data-value="0.693948">0.6939</td></tr>
  <tr><td class="freq-rank" data-value="7">7</td><td class="freq-word">coislander</td><td class="freq-letters">e a i s r o n l c d</td><td class="freq-score" data-value="0.692590">0.6926</td></tr>

### Top 50 by positional first + last letter

Score = baseline rate of the word's first letter + baseline rate of the word's last letter. Both contribute even when they're the same letter (no distinct cap).
